blocks.text: Led 0→1 development of an onboarding automation MVP for early-stage startups. Standardized role-based workflows, reduced manual coordination, and improved free-to-paid activation across Harmonize's HR suite.
Problem
Manual onboarding caused missed steps and inconsistent new-hire experience.
Existing HR tools were too rigid for small, fast-changing startup teams.
Startups needed role-specific workflows without HRIS-level setup overhead.
Harmonize needed a stronger free-to-paid activation path.
My Role
Owned MVP strategy, scope, and roadmap as Lead Product Manager.
Ran 20+ usability interviews and synthesized findings into workflow design.
Partnered with Engineering, Design, and Growth to ship and iterate.
Product Approach
Anchored MVP on the highest-frequency onboarding jobs to be done.
Prioritized lightweight automation over deep HRIS-style configuration.
Defined success through completion rate, activation, and free-to-paid conversion.
Used positioning experiments to validate messaging before scaling features.
Solution

items.title: Role-based templates
items.description: Configurable onboarding flows by role for repeatable structure with room to adapt.

items.title: Automated email scheduling
items.description: Reminders and sequenced communication that reduce manual coordination.

items.title: Completion tracking
items.description: Operator-facing visibility into onboarding status across new hires.

items.title: Activation hooks
items.description: Adjacent HR product touchpoints exposed during onboarding to drive paid adoption.

blocks.text: Key Product Decisions

blocks.tradeoff: Role templates instead of fully custom workflows.
blocks.outcome: Startups launched quickly with role-appropriate structure.

blocks.tradeoff: Shipped the core onboarding loop instead of full HRIS features.
blocks.outcome: Faster validation of demand with lower MVP complexity.

blocks.tradeoff: Automated reminders while keeping operators in control of content.
blocks.outcome: Reduced coordination without eroding operator trust.

blocks.tradeoff: Exposed paid HR workflows inside the free onboarding flow.

blocks.text: Results & Impact
Outreach response rate improved from 10% to 35% after positioning refresh.
Monthly recurring revenue increased 7% via free-to-paid conversion.
Manual onboarding coordination reduced through templates and scheduled communications.
Standardized new-hire experience across role types.
Created a reusable workflow foundation feeding broader HR suite engagement.
Metrics Tracked
Onboarding completion rate
Time to onboarding completion
Startups activating onboarding workflows
Free-to-paid conversion rate
Outreach response rate
Engagement with adjacent Harmonize products
Key Learnings
For early-stage teams, the best onboarding product is the fastest to start, not the most configurable.
Workflow automation works best when it removes coordination, not judgment.
Positioning moved the needle as much as functionality — response rates tripled on the same product.
